authority: This file is the single source of truth for numbers (GR-1). No metric appears in prose except as a citation of this file. Keystone-only writes.

objective.gate: tools/lexon_check.mjs full pass on every proposed LEXICON entry, plus 5 held-out census terms expressed by the assayer using only the proposal's pattern recipe, plus 3 covered regression entries; gateResult 8/8 (T5: zero collapses). Regime: spec-checker (real Lexon compiler is macOS-only, source unpublished; see SOURCES.md lexon-compiler-status).
objective.hardConstraint: every entry cites a SOURCES.md slug (GR-9 trace-or-delete); register discipline proven/conjectured/speculative never upgraded; no em dashes in artifact/; no C-series numbers or confidence percentages from any seat (GR-3)

baseline.how: node tools/census.mjs --freeze (rule pinned in artifact/CENSUS.json and tools/census.mjs EXCLUSIONS); coverage-debt re-derived by node tools/coverage.mjs against artifact/LEXICON.lexon.md

best.evidence: run lexr2 2026-07-10 (wf_4017e0c4-584, status INCOMPLETE: rounds 1-3 complete, round 4 lost to session-limit outage at the Gap seats, engine reported outage not exhaustion): 5 levers VALIDATED 8/8, 1 MIRAGE (quantity-gate-charter round-2 scale-up: em dash in entry T-092 term/notes violated the hard constraint and its hardConstraintNote self-certification was false; critic classed the mirage noise not structural, no K-id, salvage folded via other levers). Keystone fold 2026-07-11: 13 unique proposal entries (heavy cross-lever overlap: T-025/026/031/032 proposed by ALL levers in ALL rounds; one expression folded per censusId, arbitration recorded in chronicles/2026-07-11_lexr2_fold.md) + 16 deduped assayer-authored held-out entries, all 29 re-verified GATE PASS at fold and all 29 inside artifact/OT2_REGISTER.json. node tools/coverage.mjs = 152, 59 covered, 0 failed. OT-2 register: 34 of 42 covered, residue 8 ids. Verdicts in runs/lexr2/*/ and the engine record.

openTarget.statement: spell-grammar register under the mutation-hardened gate (lexr3): promote the third finder lens (seat cards, skills, and harness structures as promise bundles in Lexon controlled English, artifact/SPELL_GRAMMAR.md the target surface) now that the base lexicon has legs (59 covered) and every new entry must carry a RELATION PASS claim; secondary food = the OT-2 residue (8 quantitative ids) and the uncovered canon remainder (~152). This is the path to the operator result: lexon your own dual agents. OT-3 (mutation-probe falsifiability) CLOSED by construction 2026-07-11: tools/relation_check.mjs (claim grammar gate/ordering/conjunction/absence; twin = minimal structural negation that still gate-passes; direction claimed as absence) selftest 10/10 green, live RELATION PASS on folded T-148/T-032/T-092, registered as objective.canary, conform advisory cleared; the gate can now tell a fortress standing from a fortress fallen. First live use = lexr3 assay (binding in harness.config.mjs).
